title: Scope of Regular Assessment. The Assessment shall be undertaken as
content: 28 a requirement for the upgrading of provisional license to a regular license, renewal of 29 license and branch authority, transfer of office, additional and giving-up of office space, 30 and once every two (2) years after issuance or renewal of license. 31 32 The Assessment shall cover the following, among others: 33 34 a. Maintenance of the minimum office space, facilities and equipment; 35 36 b. Maintenance of the required signages and postings, such as Department door 37 sticker, agency license, organizational chart, “Kaukulang Bayad” poster and anti- 38 illegal recruitment campaign posters, among others; 39 40 c. Examination of books of accounts, official receipts, and financial statements; 41 42 d. Compliance with general labor standards and occupational safety and health 43 standards; and 44 45 e. Compliance with R.A. No. 10173. 46 47 The assessment report shall be submitted within twenty-four (24) hours from the date of 48 inspection. 49 50
